# init(rawValue:)

**Initializer**

Initializes an error code with a value that represents the underlying type of error.

## Declaration

```swift
init?(rawValue: Int)
```

## Parameters

- **rawValue**: The raw integer value that represents the error code.
title: init(rawValue:)
